description_long: This object is a pair of round, vintage-style glasses with green-tinted lenses and a distinctive flip-up mechanism on one side. The frame is robust and features a full-rim design, with a metallic bridge and temples that curve gently at the ends for a secure fit. The flip-up lens is attached to the right side, allowing one lens to be lifted independently, a feature often seen in steampunk or retro eyewear. The temples are relatively thick and appear to have a textured or segmented design, adding to the overall ornate appearance. The bridge is a simple, straight bar connecting the two lenses, with no visible nose pads. No brand logo or insignia is visible on any part of the glasses.
description: A pair of round, green-tinted vintage glasses with a flip-up lens and ornate, thick temples. The frame is full-rimmed and metallic, with a straight bridge and no visible branding.
description_view_0: Front view showing both round green lenses, with the right lens flipped up and the ornate temples visible.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the thickness of the temples and the flip-up mechanism on the right lens.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the curved temples and the full-rim frame, with both lenses visible from behind.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the left temple and the profile of the flip-up lens mechanism.
attribute_frame_design: The frame is round with a full-rim structure, featuring a robust and slightly ornate design. The temples are thick and gently curved, with a segmented or textured appearance. The frame includes a flip-up mechanism on the right lens, adding a functional and decorative element.
attribute_lens_tint: The lenses are visibly tinted green, with a uniform coloration and moderate transparency. The right lens can be flipped up, but both lenses share the same tint.
attribute_bridge_style: The bridge is a straight, metallic bar connecting the two lenses, with no visible nose pads or additional embellishments.
attribute_temple_detailing: The temples are thick, gently curved, and appear to have a segmented or textured design, giving them an ornate and vintage look. No engravings or additional decorations are visible.
